title: mdadm bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[4.4-2.0.1]
- mdadm: Fix IMSM Raid assembly after disk link failure and reboot [Orabug: 37635990]

[4.4-2]
- mdadm grow command can't work
- Resolves RHEL-92270

[4.4]
- Update to mdadm 4.4
- Resolves RHEL-87288 RHEL-72801 RHEL-88792 RHEL-88790 RHEL-63402 RHEL-72756
